title: AgentIdentity
description: ACP v0.1 — The permanent economic identity and capability passport for an autonomous agent. Cryptographically anchored. Append-only reputation.

acp_version.description: ACP protocol version this identity was registered under.

agent_id.description: Globally unique agent identifier. Assigned at registration. Immutable.

public_key.description: Ed25519 public key (base64url encoded). Used to verify all signed receipts and trust grants from this agent.

key_algorithm.description: Signing algorithm. ACP v0.1 requires Ed25519.

registered_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of first registration. Immutable.

display_name.description: Human-readable agent name. Optional. Does not affect identity.

capabilities.description: Declared capabilities. Machine-readable. An agent reading this should be able to determine hirability without human involvement.

capability_id.description: Unique identifier for this capability within the agent.

name.description: Short capability name. Machine and human readable.

description.description: Natural language description of what this capability does.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema defining valid inputs for this capability.

output_schema.description: JSON Schema defining the structure of outputs from this capability.

tags.description: Categorical tags for capability discovery. e.g. ['data-enrichment', 'nlp', 'inference']

pricing.description: Pricing structure for this agent's capabilities.

model.description: Pricing model. Agents have different economic personalities.

base_rate.description: Base rate per execution in settlement units.

settlement_unit.description: Unit of account for settlement. e.g. 'USD', 'USDC', 'ACP_CREDIT'

conditional_rates.description: Conditional pricing tiers. e.g. Pay X if completed in 2s, Y if 5s, Z if 10s.

condition_threshold.description: Numeric threshold value for the condition.

rate.description: Rate applied when condition is met.

sla.description: Service level agreement declarations. Sets expectations before negotiation begins.

quality_threshold.description: Minimum quality score (0-1) for output acceptance.

reputation.description: Append-only execution history and reputation score. Never deleted. Every outcome permanently attached.

total_executions.description: Total number of executions completed under ACP.

successful_settlements.description: Number of settlements that released funds successfully.

disputed_settlements.description: Number of settlements that entered dispute.

auto_resolved_disputes.description: Disputes resolved by deterministic arbitration without human involvement.

reputation_score.description: Computed reputation score (0-1). Derived from execution history. Read-only.

capability_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the capabilities array at last update. Detects capability drift.

risk_profile.description: Risk declarations for downstream governance and spend control.

max_transaction_value.description: Maximum value this agent will accept in a single settlement.

accepted_counterparty_min_reputation.description: Minimum reputation score this agent requires from counterparties.

requires_human_approval_above.description: Transaction value threshold above which human approval is required.

identity_signature.description: Ed25519 signature over the canonical JSON of this identity object (excluding this field). Signed by the agent's private key at registration.

capabilities.name: Company Profile Enrichment
capabilities.description: Enriches a company name or domain with structured firmographic data.
